root: ^I'm Bitey, one of the fish Electra ate.~My preferences have~not been respected!
^This is awful!~I wanted to make a friend,~instead I was made a meal.
^I promise it was an accident!~You ARE vaguely fish-shaped though.
^We should find Electra's funny bone~and give it a tickle.
^Then we'll be laughed right out of here.
^That sounds crazy,~but I don't have~any better ideas.
^Also my friends are going~to try and bite you,~so watch out!
^Why does everyone want~to eat me today?
^It's not for the taste,~I can tell you that much.
